1.name: Hags' Wrinkles
1.description: Alter skin and the underlying fatty tissue to create disguises or small pockets of flesh
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 143
Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 40
Laws of Elysium Pg. 72
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 471

2.name: Putrefaction
2.description: Inflict the decomposition of aging upon a victim
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 143
Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 40
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 471

3.name: Ashes to Ashes
3.description: Transform into a pile of thick, sticky powder
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 143
Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 41
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 471

4.name: Withering
4.description: Shrivel a victim's limb, making it useless
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 143
Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 41
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 472

5.name: Infection
5.description: Create infections in the aggravated wounds of others to feed them your vitae
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 144

5.name: Necrosis
5.description: Cause a victim's tissue to decompose and fall off
references: Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 41
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 473

6.name: Compress
6.description: Shrink a victim's skin until it explodes off them, and then add it to yourself
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 144
Laws of Elysium Pg. 73

6.name: Creeping Infection
6.description: Suspend a use of Putrefaction, Withering, or Necrosis for months until you decide to activate it
references: Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 41
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 473

6.name: Marrow Sucker
references: Lore of the Bloodlines Pg. 91

7.name: Dust to Dust
7.description: As Ashes to Ashes, but you have limited movement and use of Disciplines
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 144
Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 42
Laws of Elysium Pg. 73
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 473

8.name: Putrescent Servitude
8.description: Force a mortal or recently dead corpse to become your ghoul
references: Vampire Storyteller's Companion Pg. 42
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 473

8.name: Rigor Mortis
8.description: Make a victim's body lock up, inflicting great pain and possibly inducing Frenzy
references: Vampire Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 144
